text:
In a quiet border town, there was a young boy named Tom. He loved collecting stamps. Every Saturday, he would spend hours at the local library, searching through albums filled with beautiful images of faraway lands. Among his favorites were stamps from the fantastical places found in children's books.

One bright morning, Tom discovered a rare postage stamp. It was a vivid picture of a mermaid on an underwater palace. He knew immediately it was special. That evening, after returning from the library, he sat by the window, his eyes tracing the glossy image.

Suddenly, Tom heard a strange rumble—something was knocking at his window. Intrigued, he went to see. Outside sat a cat, its green eyes gleaming with curiosity. The cat's ears twitched rhythmically, as if tapping, signaling a message.

Tom approached eagerly. The cat nudged him gently with its paw and pointed to its tail. It seemed to be talking! By the time Tom understood, the
